sections.paragraph:
f. (with Tzere impure) a burning with fire, Gen 11:3 burning, conflagration, setting on fire, Lev 10:6 Amo 4:11 especially the solemn burning of dead bodies, 2Ch 16:14 21:19 . הַר שְׂרֵפָה a mountain burned up, Jerem. 51:25 . הָיָה לִשְׂרֵפָה to be delivered to burning, i.e. to be burned, Isa 9:4 64:10 .

I.
